workingTree.emptyTitle: No uncommitted changes in the working tree
workingTree.emptyDetail: The current branch has no changes relative to the selected base.

lastRun.tooLargeTitle: Directory too large, change preview disabled
lastRun.tooLargeDetail: This Workspace has too many files; change preview is not generated for now.
lastRun.noReviewTitle: No previous run to review yet
lastRun.noReviewDetail: After an Agent run completes, file changes will appear here.
lastRun.noFilesTitle: No file changes in the last run
lastRun.noFilesDetail: This run produced no workspace file changes.

banner.overlapped: Other runs occurred in this Workspace during this run; some changes may come from concurrent runs
banner.recovered: Snapshot recovered after an app restart; change attribution may be imprecise
banner.partial: Some files exceeded the size limit and no diff was generated
banner.incomplete: This run's snapshot is incomplete; click to retry
banner.unavailable: This run's change snapshot is unavailable

file.sensitiveContent: A sensitive file changed; its contents were not saved.
file.diffTruncated: The diff is too large and has been truncated.

binary.notSupported: Binary file; text diff not supported.
